prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Bosch MGU050-120** electric motor (replacing the stock **Permanent Magnet Synchronous Motor (PMSM)**) with a **custom silicon carbide (SiC) inverter** from **STMicroelectronics**, increasing peak power from 360 kW to **480 kW (643 hp)** and torque from 700 Nm to **950 Nm**, while optimizing regenerative braking efficiency via **AP Racing 4-piston calipers** and **Brembo CCM-R carbon-ceramic rotors** (380mm front, 355mm rear) for sustained high-load performance.

Installation of a **Mahle 800V ultra-fast charging system** with **NIO’s proprietary 150 kWh semi-solid-state battery pack** (replacing the stock 100 kWh unit), paired with a **Vitesco Technologies thermal management system** using **3M Novec 7100 dielectric fluid** for sub-10-minute 10-80% charging at 350 kW stations, while integrating a **Magna PT eDrive 2-speed transmission** (replacing the single-speed) for optimized acceleration and top-speed efficiency (0-100 km/h in **2.9s**, top speed electronically limited to **260 km/h**).

Chassis reinforcement via **BBS FI-R 20x9.5 ET35 forged wheels** (front) and **20x11 ET45** (rear) with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R** tires (265/30 R20 front, 295/25 R20 rear), combined with a **KW Automotive Clubsport 3-way coilover suspension** (adjustable rebound, compression, and preload) featuring **NIO-specific spring rates (12 kg/mm front, 14 kg/mm rear)** and **Öhlins TTX46 dampers** for track use, alongside a **Cusco Type-RS 4-point strut brace** and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm)** for reduced body roll.
estetica: Full **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS ET5 Touring Sport widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with **custom 50mm extended wheel arches**, paired with a **Seibon Carbon fiber hood** featuring **dual functional vents** for battery cooling and a **Vorsteiner carbon fiber rear diffuser** with **active aerodynamics (adjustable Gurney flap)** for downforce optimization.

Custom **PPG Matte Obsidian Black (9080)** paint with **3M Scotchcal Gloss Black vinyl accents** on the roof, side mirrors, and front splitter, complemented by **Oracle Lighting RGB+A adaptive LED headlights** (replacing stock units) with **custom DRLs** and **Morimoto XB LED fog lights**, while integrating a **Rear Design carbon fiber rear spoiler** (adjustable angle via **Motec PDM15**) for dynamic downforce control.

Interior overhaul with **Recaro SPG XL carbon fiber bucket seats** (replacing stock seats) upholstered in **Nappa leather with Alcantara suede inserts** and **embroidered NIO Performance logos**, paired with a **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (flat-bottom, suede-wrapped) featuring **integrated Motec C127 dash display**, while the rear cargo area is fitted with a **custom aluminum roll cage (TIG-welded, 4130 chromoly)** and **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses** for track-day safety.
